---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve Gebeta Sovereign Code Assistant
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.  
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like in as much detail as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Impact

Who would benefit from this feature? (e.g., solo developers, fintech teams, open source contributors)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references (e.g., links to similar features in other tools).
